summary: Explainability Polish Testing Complete - All 11 features verified. reasonShort displays consistently across Hero, Peek Row, Priority Cards, and Timeline. Empty states implemented with correct text. Stable sorting in place.
critical_code_review_comments: computeAttention.js lines 121-146: reasonShort computed correctly with all edge cases (coach task, overdue days, due today/tomorrow, activity days, first contact, no engagement, on track)
PipelineHero.js line 257-261: reasonShort displayed below primaryAction with data-testid='hero-reason-short'
PipelineHero.js getShortAction() at line 26-32: Uses reasonShort for peek row items
PipelineHero.js line 291: Peek row shows 'School · reasonShort' format correctly
PipelinePage.js PriorityCard lines 457-464: reasonShort shown on line 3 with data-testid='priority-reason-{id}' (only for high/medium attention)
ComingUpTimeline.js line 44: reasonShort displayed with data-testid='timeline-reason-{id}'
PriorityBoard lines 475-478: Empty state text correctly defined ('Nothing urgent right now', 'No upcoming actions', 'No programs on track yet')
PriorityBoard lines 484-489: 'Everything is on track' banner shows when allOnTrack=true (high=0 && medium=0 && low>0)
computeAllAttention stable sort at lines 187-201: Correct tie-breaking order (score → due date → stage priority → alphabetical)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Explainability polish fully verified. KEY FINDINGS: (1) reasonShort computed by computeAttention with values like 'Coach assigned a task', 'Overdue by X days', 'Due today', 'Due tomorrow', 'Due in X days', 'No response in X days', 'Ready for first contact', 'No recent engagement', 'On track'. (2) Hero shows reasonShort below primaryAction text. (3) Peek row shows 'School · reasonShort' format. (4) Priority cards show reasonShort on line 3 for high/medium attention only. (5) Coming Up Timeline shows reasonShort. (6) Empty states: 'Nothing urgent right now' (high), 'No upcoming actions' (medium), 'Everything is on track' banner (when all low). (7) Stable sorting implemented: score → due date → stage → alphabetical.

verified_features.6_consistency_check: PASS - Florida Atlantic shows 'Due today' in both Timeline and Priority Card
verified_features.7_consistency_hero_priority: PASS - University of Florida shows 'Coach assigned a task' in both Hero and Priority Card
verified_features.8_stable_sorting: PASS - computeAllAttention sorts by score → due date → stage → alphabetical (lines 187-201)
verified_features.9_empty_state_attention: IMPLEMENTED - 'Nothing urgent right now' in code (line 476)
